control.description-key: Validate bound documentId is GUID — fallback to entity record ID (v1.0.33)

property.name: documentId
property.description-key: The GUID of the source document

property.name: tenantId
property.description-key: Tenant identifier (resolved from sprk_TenantId env var if empty)

property.name: clientAppId
property.description-key: Azure AD Client App ID (resolved from sprk_MsalClientId env var)

property.name: bffAppId
property.description-key: BFF App ID for OAuth scope (resolved from sprk_BffApiAppId env var)

property.name: apiBaseUrl
property.description-key: BFF API base URL (resolved from sprk_BffApiBaseUrl env var if empty)

property.name: selectedDocumentId
property.description-key: The document selected by the user
